batch_summary: Deed [330] (FC Doc# 1008387, OR 1181/229) is an Assignment of Water Rights from TXU Electric Company to TXU Big Brown Company LP, effective January 1, 2002. It transfers Certificate of Adjudication No. 08-5040 (dam and reservoir on Big Brown Creek) — NOT real property. This was ISSUE-43 item 17, pulled to determine whether the rail spur parcel from deed [13] was assigned to the Big Brown entity chain. The answer is NO — this instrument conveys only water permits. However, the recitals confirm that separate special warranty deeds WERE executed under a Master Separation Agreement to convey TXU Electric's Freestone County real property to TXU Big Brown Co LP and others. The rail spur conveyance deed (if it exists as a separate recorded instrument) remains unidentified. All 'scope TBD' / 'scope unknown' references for Doc# 1008387 across files 04, 05, and 06 are updated to reflect 'WATER RIGHTS ONLY — NOT real property.' ISSUE-06 priority action (2) marked DONE; new action added to search for the Master Separation Agreement special warranty deeds. ISSUE-21 status updated.

03_DEED_CHAIN_SUMMARY.md.timestamp_summary: Deed [330] added to Phase 3 — Assignment of Water Rights, TXU Electric Co → TXU Big Brown Co LP (2002, water rights only — NOT real property); ISSUE-43 item 17 PULLED

operations.description: Add deed [330] entry to Phase 3, after deed [327] (10a). This is a corporate succession instrument — water rights only, no real property conveyed.
operations.content: 10b. `2002-01-01_[330]_f` — TXU Electric Company → TXU Big Brown Company LP (assignment of water rights, Freestone) — **NOT A REAL PROPERTY CONVEYANCE.** Assigns Certificate of Adjudication No. 08-5040 (dam and reservoir on Big Brown Creek, issued 05/05/1987) from TXU Electric Company (formerly Texas Utilities Electric Company, successor by merger to Dallas Power & Light Company, Texas Power & Light Company, and Texas Electric Service Company) to TXU Big Brown Company LP ("BB Genco"), a Texas limited partnership. Executed pursuant to Master Separation Agreement dated January 1, 2002 and contemporaneous special warranty deed(s) conveying Grantor's Freestone County real property to BB Genco "and others." **Recitals confirm separate special warranty deeds exist for real property — the rail spur conveyance (if included) would be in those separate deeds, NOT in this instrument.** Executed as of January 1, 2002. Signed by Thomas L. Baker, President, TXU Electric Company. Acknowledged December 14, 2001, Dallas County, before Teresa Muirhead NP (commission exp. May 15, 2004). Recording: OR Vol. 1181, Pg. 229–231 (3 pages), Doc# 1008387, Freestone County. Filed Dec 20, 2001 at 1:43 PM; Mary Lynn White, County Clerk, Freestone County; Deputy: Kelly Barker. Fee: $13.00. Return address: Project Champion, Worsham Forsythe Wooldridge LLP, 1601 Bryan Street 30th Floor, Dallas TX 75201. **ISSUE-43 item 17 satisfied. ISSUE-06 advanced (Doc# 1008387 scope confirmed: water rights only). ISSUE-21 advanced (same).** [PDF CONFIRMED: deed [330], 2026-04-01]
